```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(vars)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)

select <- dplyr::select
```

```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ  <- 52
ALPHA <- 0.05
MAX_LAG <- 8

VAR_VARS <- c(
  "target_price",
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

EXOG_VARS <- c(
  "shock_2021q4_2023q1",
  "post_shock",
  "week_sin",
  "week_cos"
)

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}

make_stationary <- function(x, name, alpha = 0.05) {

  s <- x

  for (d in 0:1) {

    pval <- tryCatch(
      adf.test(s[!is.na(s)])$p.value,
      error = function(e) 1
    )

    if (pval < alpha)
      return(list(series = s, d = d))

    s <- c(NA, diff(s))
  }

  list(series = s, d = 1)
}
```

```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df))
  df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```

```{r}
all_results <- list()
all_models  <- list()
all_preds   <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train")

  test_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "test")

  if (nrow(train_df) < 30 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  real_idx <- test_df$target_was_missing == 0

  avail_vars <- VAR_VARS[
    VAR_VARS %in% names(sub) &
      sapply(VAR_VARS, function(v)
        sum(!is.na(train_df[[v]])) > MAX_LAG + 5)
  ]

  if (!"target_price" %in% avail_vars) next

  avail_vars <- c(
    "target_price",
    avail_vars[avail_vars != "target_price"]
  )

  avail_exog <- EXOG_VARS[EXOG_VARS %in% names(sub)]

  train_mat <- train_df %>%
    select(all_of(avail_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(),
           ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  d_orders <- setNames(
    integer(length(avail_vars)),
    avail_vars
  )

  train_stat <- train_mat

  for (v in avail_vars) {

    res <- make_stationary(train_mat[[v]], v, ALPHA)

    train_stat[[v]] <- res$series
    d_orders[v]     <- res$d
  }

  train_stat <- train_stat %>% drop_na()

  exog_train <- if (length(avail_exog) > 0) {

    train_df %>%
      select(all_of(avail_exog)) %>%
      tail(nrow(train_stat)) %>%
      as.matrix()

  } else NULL

  lag_sel <- tryCatch(
    VARselect(
      train_stat,
      lag.max = MAX_LAG,
      type = "const",
      exogen = exog_train
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(lag_sel)) next

  chosen_lag <- lag_sel$selection["SC(n)"]

  model_var <- tryCatch(
    VAR(
      train_stat,
      p = chosen_lag,
      type = "const",
      exogen = exog_train
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(model_var)) next

  fc <- tryCatch(
    predict(
      model_var,
      n.ahead = n_test,
      dumvar = if (length(avail_exog) > 0)
        as.matrix(test_df %>% select(all_of(avail_exog)))
      else NULL
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(fc)) next

  pred_diff <- fc$fcst$target_price[, "fcst"]
  pred_vals <- numeric(n_test)

  last_val <- tail(train_df$target_price, 1)

  if (d_orders["target_price"] == 2) {

    last_fd <- diff(train_df$target_price)
    last_fd <- last_fd[length(last_fd)]

    for (i in seq_len(n_test)) {
      last_fd <- last_fd + pred_diff[i]
      last_val <- last_val + last_fd
      pred_vals[i] <- last_val
    }

  } else if (d_orders["target_price"] == 1) {

    for (i in seq_len(n_test)) {
      last_val <- last_val + pred_diff[i]
      pred_vals[i] <- last_val
    }

  } else {

    pred_vals <- pred_diff
  }

  actual <- test_df$target_price
  valid  <- !is.na(pred_vals) & !is.na(actual) & real_idx

  label <- paste0("VAR(", chosen_lag, ")")

  smape_val <- round(
    calc_smape(actual[valid], pred_vals[valid]),
    4
  )

  all_results[[comm]] <-
    tibble(
      commodity = comm,
      model = label,
      sMAPE = smape_val
    )

  all_models[[comm]] <- model_var

  all_preds[[comm]] <-
    tibble(
      date = test_df$date,
      actual = actual,
      pred = pred_vals
    )
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```

### ALL VAR MODELS — sMAPE

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(results_df)
```

```{r}
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity) %>%
  slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()
```

### BEST MODEL PER COMMODITY (by sMAPE)

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(best_df)
```

### Residual diagnostics for best models

```{r echo=FALSE}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {

  comm <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]

  model_var <- all_models[[comm]]

  cat("\n####", comm, "—", best_model, "\n\n")

  resid_target <- as.numeric(
    residuals(model_var)[, "target_price"]
  )

  resid_clean <- resid_target[!is.na(resid_target)]

  lb <- Box.test(
    resid_clean,
    lag = 10,
    type = "Ljung-Box"
  )

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Ljung-Box(10) p-value: %.4f %s\n",
    lb$p.value,
    ifelse(lb$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")
  ))

  if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {

    nt <- shapiro.test(resid_clean)

    cat(sprintf(
      "  Shapiro-Wilk p-value: %.4f %s\n",
      nt$p.value,
      ifelse(nt$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")
    ))
  }

  cat("\n")
}
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}

plots <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {

  comm <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  best_smape <- best_df$sMAPE[i]

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train") %>%
    drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2

  train_plot <- train_df %>%
    filter(date >= cutoff)

  test_plot <- all_preds[[comm]]

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(
      data = train_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = target_price),
      color = "grey60",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
      linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Actual" = "#2c3e50",
        "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"
      ),
      name = NULL
    ) +
    labs(
      title = comm,
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f",
        best_model,
        best_smape
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Price"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  plots[[i]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {

  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "VAR — Forecast vs Actual",
      theme = theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
    )

  print(combined)
}
```
